title: Good Luck Not Lasting.
content:
If well the dice run, let's applaud the cast:
    The happy fortune will not always last.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Robert Herrick, titled "Good Luck Not Lasting.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
